description: record a held-out merge-gate decision against the TEST evaluator; promote M_best only if it improves (the Decide step)
rules: records the candidate's test_score and compares it to the current best per metric_direction
promotes M_best (best_node / best_test_score / best_branch_ref) only when the test score improves
a high-dev / low-test gap is informative: the gate rejects it and M_best stays unchanged
usage: Set NODE and TEST_SCORE (the score from running the TEST evaluator in a FRESH worktree); optional BRANCH_REF is the artifact ref to promote. Output: merge.txt. If no run exists, a bootstrap run with a root + one child node (n1) is created first.
limitation: Records a decision in local state only — it does NOT run the test evaluator and does NOT merge any git branch or mutate the live artifact. Call it only AFTER evaluating the candidate on E_test yourself.
